# Agent Guide — Python detector (`repo_fingerprint`)

## Run
```bash
pip install -e 'packages/py[test]'
repo-fingerprint <path> [--format json|text] [--deep]
python -m repo_fingerprint.schema <report.json>   # validate a report (needs jsonschema)
```
Exit codes: `0` detected, `1` none, `2` usage error. Env overrides: `RF_MATRIX`, `RF_SCHEMA`.
Zero runtime dependencies (stdlib `tomllib`, `xml.etree`, `json`, `re`); `jsonschema`/`pytest` are
`[test]` extras only.

## Import surface
```python
from repo_fingerprint import fingerprint          # -> DetectionReport dataclass
from repo_fingerprint.canonical import canonicalize
from repo_fingerprint.schema import validate_report

report = fingerprint("/path/to/repo")
doc = report.to_dict()
valid, errors = validate_report(doc)
```

## Layout (`src/repo_fingerprint/`)
`walker` → `signals` → `parsers` → `frameworks` → `topology` / `infra` → `confidence` → `report`
→ `fingerprint` → `cli`. Behaviorally matched to the TS twin; `confidence.round4` uses
`Decimal(ROUND_HALF_UP)` to match JS `Math.round`.

## Tests
```bash
cd packages/py && python -m pytest        # 34 tests: confidence, parsers, goldens, schema, cli
```
`test_golden.py` asserts this impl reproduces `fixtures/*/expected-report.json` exactly.
